items.description:
Tight, sculpted leather shorts featuring a bold front lace-up closure, glossy material folds, and a smooth, body-hugging silhouette. Designed for avatars who want a striking, high-fashion or nightlife-inspired look, these shorts pair perfectly with boots, jackets, and full Pale outfits. Available in multiple standout colorways for maximum styling versatility.
